message:
🌱 Add keycloak: Add support for SMTP OAuth 2.0 authentication for outgoing mission (#864)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "keycloak-17432-add-support-for-smtp-oauth-2-0-authentication-for-outgoing-email",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "keycloak: Add support for SMTP OAuth 2.0 authentication for outgoing email",
+    "description": "Add support for SMTP OAuth 2.0 authentication for outgoing email. Requested by 57+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Keycloak setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Keycloak version supports SMTP OAuth 2.0 (requires Keycloak 26.1+):\n```bash\n# If running in a container:\ndocker exec keycloak /opt/keycloak/bin/kc.sh show-config\n\n# Or check the container image version:\ndocker inspect keycloak | grep -i image\n```\nThis feature requires a running Keycloak server with access to the Admin Console."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Understand the SMTP OAuth 2.0 requirement",
+        "description": "Many email providers (Microsoft 365, Google Workspace) are deprecating basic SMTP authentication in favor of OAuth 2.0. Keycloak's outgoing email (password resets, verification emails, etc.) previously only supported basic SMTP auth, which means it could lose the ability to send email through these providers.\n\nThis feature adds OAuth 2.0 token-based SMTP authentication as an alternative to username/password credentials."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Configure SMTP OAuth 2.0 in the Admin Console",
+        "description": "Navigate to the Keycloak Admin Console and configure the SMTP OAuth 2.0 settings:\n1. Go to **Realm Settings > Email**\n2. Under **Connection & Authentication**, select the OAuth 2.0 authentication method\n3. Provide the OAuth 2.0 token endpoint, client ID, and client secret for your email provider\n4. Save the configuration\n\nSee the [source PR](https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/pull/36665) for implementation details."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify email delivery works",
+        "description": "Test that Keycloak can send emails using the new OAuth 2.0 SMTP configuration:\n1. In the Admin Console, go to **Realm Settings > Email**\n2. Click **Test Connection** to verify SMTP connectivity\n3. Trigger a password reset or email verification to confirm end-to-end delivery"
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Keycloak added SMTP OAuth 2.0 authentication support, allowing outgoing emails (password resets, verification emails) to authenticate via OAuth 2.0 tokens instead of basic username/password credentials. This ensures compatibility with providers like Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace that are deprecating basic SMTP auth.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "keycloak",
+      "community",
+      "identity",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "keycloak"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/issues/17432",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/pull/36665"
+    },
+    "reactions": 57,
+    "comments": 22,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Keycloak server (via Docker/Podman or Kubernetes with the Keycloak Operator) with Admin Console access."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:48:26.239Z",

+}
